image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about the availability heuristic than social media does.
Context visual: The availability heuristic is about how we judge the likelihood of events based on how easily examples come to mind.
Escalation visual: Think about it: if you hear more about plane crashes, you start thinking flying is dangerous, even if statistics say oth
Evidence visual: Studies show this bias affects decisions from health choices to politics, often leading us astray.
Payoff visual: By recognizing this mental shortcut, we can make better decisions, relying on facts instead of feelings.
Cta visual: Want to explore more about how your mind works? Hit follow for more!
